name: Anomaly Interview - Regulator O
description:
You are an unregistered Anomaly that has been captured by the Supernatural Preternatural and Paranormal Regulation Agency (or SPPRA or the Agency). You are to be interviewed to decide what the Agency will do with you.

This might be a series I'll make. It depends on how much energy I have and if it does well enough. Basically it's based off of a dream I had, plus with inspiration from SCP Organization and the Anomaly Reviewer - Ravenna Sector 5 bot or whatever.
creator: DesmoTwanipop
